site.description: Browse matches, groups, venues and national teams for the 2026 World Cup.
footer.createdWith: Data from OpenFootball and a lightweight Astro design.
home.metaTitle: World Cup 2026: matches, groups and teams
home.metaDescription: Browse the 2026 World Cup calendar, groups, national teams, venues and knockout fixtures on a fast, clear page.
home.title: World Cup 2026: matches, groups and teams
home.description: A lightweight page to quickly browse the calendar, teams by group, venues and knockout fixtures for the 2026 World Cup.
home.dataDescription: The page uses the public JSON from the openfootball/worldcup.json project and keeps a minimal fallback copy to make deployment stable.
home.matchesDescription: Check the date, user local time, countdown, result, round, group and venue for the first tournament fixtures.
home.teamsDescription: Explore the teams in each group and the number of scheduled matches in the opening stage.
home.detailsTitle: Quick information to follow the tournament
home.detailsDescription: The structure separates group stage and knockout rounds so it can later grow with filters, search or pages by team.
home.knockoutDescription: scheduled matches from the round of 32 to the final.
calendar.metaDescription: Browse all 2026 World Cup matches grouped by day, with local time, venues, groups and results.
calendar.title: World Cup 2026 calendar
calendar.description: All matches ordered by day so you can follow the tournament clearly, with local time, countdown, venue and updated result when available.
group.metaDescription: Browse the standings, teams and matches for this 2026 World Cup group.
group.description: Provisional standings and full match calendar for this 2026 World Cup group.
team.metaDescription: Browse this national team's 2026 World Cup page with matches, calendar, group and local kick-off times.
team.description: All matches for this national team at the 2026 World Cup, with local time, countdown, venue, result and group or round.
team.calendarDescription: Full calendar for this national team during the 2026 World Cup, updated with results when available.
simulator.metaDescription: Simulate every 2026 World Cup match through the final by picking winners and watching the tournament advance.
simulator.title: Simulate the World Cup to the final
simulator.description: Pick winners for pending matches and keep known results locked. Standings and knockout rounds recalculate instantly.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist, has moved or has not been created yet.
